news-global-econ.title: Seattle residents say they are in 'survival mode,' selling homes as high prices squeeze middle class
news-global-econ.description: A Microsoft employee's family is selling their Seattle home and downsizing as groceries, gas, insurance and housing costs surge amid record local inflation.

news-global-econ.title: Far-left podcaster Jennifer Welch calls homeschooling 'trickle down stupidity,' a 'huge problem'
news-global-econ.description: Far-left "I've Had It" podcast hosts Jennifer Welch and Angie Sullivan called homeschooling "weird as f---" and compared it to child abuse on Tuesday.

news-global-econ.title: MLB stars address salary cap, owners saying baseball is broken ahead of All-Star Game: 'Bad for the game'
news-global-econ.description: MLB stars including Mike Trout and Cody Bellinger spoke out against a salary cap at All-Star Game media days, calling it bad for the game.

news-global-econ.title: Massive T. rex fossil roars to $50 million sale, becoming one of the priciest ever auctioned
news-global-econ.description: The T. rex nicknamed "Gus" shattered auction records after a 10-minute bidding war among seven bidders, but the debate over its future rages on.

news-global-soc.title: Nolte: Wall Streeter Urges Disney to Drop Stagnant Disney+
news-global-soc.description:
Wells Fargo’s Steven Cahall believes the Disney Grooming Syndicate’s streaming service is why Disney’s stock price is a disaster.

news-global-soc.title: Mike Huckabee rejects Ro Khanna's Israel visit claims: 'Not held at gunpoint'
news-global-soc.description: Ro Khanna claims violent Israeli settlers detained his delegation for 75 minutes in the West Bank, and U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee angrily fired back.

news-global-soc.title: DOJ charges 3 Russians in alleged $63M cybercrime scheme targeting Americans
news-global-soc.description: Three Russian nationals allegedly ran bulletproof hosting firms that powered ransomware, malware, and phishing attacks on U.S. critical infrastructure.

news-global-soc.title: Iran Launches Deadly Attacks on Civilian Ships, Killing Indian Crewman
news-global-soc.description:
Iran launched cruise missiles at two oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday, killing one crew member and wounding eight others.
